SharpILMixins.Processor 1.5.0.1
Copyright (C) 2026 NickAcPT

  process, p     (Default Verb) Apply Mixins made with SharpILMixins

  generate, g    Generate helper code to work with Mixins

  help           Display more information on a specific command.

result.stderr:
SharpILMixins.Processor 1.5.0.1
Copyright (C) 2026 NickAcPT

  -t, --target-dir    Required. The directory of the target assemblies

  -o, --output-dir    The directory of where to place the output files processed
                      by this tool

  -m, --mixins        Required. The path to the Mixin Assemblies to apply

  --obf-map           The de-obfuscation maps to apply while applying the Mixins

  -p, --pause         Whether or not to wait for the user's input after the
                      processing is done

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.

SharpILMixins.Processor 1.5.0.1
Copyright (C) 2026 NickAcPT

  -d, --dump-targets               Whether or not dump the targets to the
                                   console output

  --experimental-inline-methods    Whether or not to inline methods
                                   [Experimental]

  --mixin-handler-name             Prefix for the unique name of the handler
                                   methods

  --out-suffix                     The output suffix of the input file.

  --copy-resources                 Whether or not to copy Mixin resources into
                                   the target method

  --force-keep-max-stack           Whether or not to force keeping the old max
                                   stack
